violations.text: The floor and wall junctures in the certain areas in the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
A small amount of droppings were observed in the front counter area. Area to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
